name: zone-interface
description: Zone interfaces insert contact-like behavior between zone faces or between zones and other objects. They require creation commands plus interface-node properties for stiffness and strength.

notes: Choose stiffness high enough to limit penetration but not so high that the timestep becomes unnecessarily small.
Set tensile strength deliberately; zero tension is common for opening joints.
Residual values take over after the bond breaks; displacement-zero-dilation controls when dilation vanishes.
Use bonded-slip to set whether the interface allows slip while still bonded; shear-bond-ratio scales bonded shear resistance.

related_commands_not_properties.permeability: Set via 'zone interface permeability <value>' command (interface-level, not a node property keyword).
related_commands_not_properties.stress-normal / stress-shear: Read-only node STATE — query via 'zone interface <id> node list stress' or via 'zone interface node ?' subcommands (NOT property keywords).
related_commands_not_properties.gap: Not a documented interface node property in FLAC2D 9.0.

common_patterns.name: Create interface on grouped faces (FLAC2D)
commands: zone interface create by-face range group 'Fault'
zone interface node property stiffness-normal 1e9 stiffness-shear 5e8 cohesion 1e4 friction 30 tension 0

common_patterns.name: Inspect interface state
notes: 'zone interface node list' alone is incomplete — must reference a specific interface first ('zone interface <id|name> node list <sub-kw>') with one of: displacement / extra / host / information / property / state / stress / target / velocity.

validation_notes: Check interface node count and groups immediately after creation.
Verify normal direction and selected faces before assigning properties.
For coupled flow, set and inspect permeability behavior explicitly.
